account.title: Account

home.headline: Land your dream job
home.subtitle: Start free with one resume, cover letter, portfolio, and local keyword ATS. Upgrade to Pro for job scrape, Gemini AI, and unlimited projects.

features.resumeDesc: Build and export polished resumes on Free. Pro unlocks AI tailoring and keyword-matched drafts for each role.
features.coverDesc: Write and save a cover letter on Free. Pro generates personalized letters aligned to the job description.
features.atsDesc: Free local keyword coverage against any job description. Pro adds deep AI ATS analysis and fixes.
features.scraperDesc: Pro: extract requirements from job boards and match them against your profile in one click.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Simple euro pricing. Save more with 6‑month and yearly billing.
pricing.featureCancel: Cancel anytime — keep Pro until period end
pricing.featureCard: Secure checkout · card saved for renewals
pricing.freeFeature3: No job scrape or Gemini AI
pricing.checkoutSubtitle: Complete payment securely. Your card is saved for future renewals.
pricing.successMessage: Payment received. Credits will refresh shortly.

metrics.label: Include metrics / numbers
metrics.hint: Off by default. Leave off for roles where quantification doesn’t fit. Applies to AI draft, enhance, and ATS fix.

extension.bannerTitle: Capture job descriptions with the Chrome extension
extension.bannerBody: Skip copy-paste — grab the JD from Greenhouse, Lever, LinkedIn, and more, then open a tailored draft in JobFlow.
extension.headline: Capture jobs in one click
extension.subtitle: Grab the job description from Greenhouse, Lever, LinkedIn, and more — then open a tailored resume draft in JobFlow.
extension.detected: Extension detected in this browser. You’re all set.
extension.addToChromeHint: Opens the Chrome Web Store — click Add to Chrome there to install.
extension.step1: Open chrome://extensions and turn on Developer mode
extension.step2: Click “Load unpacked” and choose the JobFlow extension/ folder from this repo
extension.step3: Come back to this tab — detection updates automatically when the extension is present
extension.devInstallHint: After you publish to the Chrome Web Store, set NUXT_PUBLIC_CHROME_EXTENSION_STORE_URL so this page shows a one-click Add to Chrome button.
extension.removedBody: Install flags were cleared. The install banner will show again on Apply and Target Role when you next open JobFlow.

linkedinSync.title: Sync to LinkedIn
linkedinSync.helpWithExtension: JobFlow stages this role and opens LinkedIn’s Edit role form. Click Fill form on the JobFlow panel (top-left). Review Highlights — nothing is saved until you confirm.
linkedinSync.helpWithoutExtension: LinkedIn blocks third-party profile writes. Copy bullets (• format for Highlights), export a PDF, or open the form — install the extension for auto-fill.

privacy.metaDescription: How JobFlow and the JobFlow Chrome extension collect, use, and protect your data.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.updated: Last updated: {date} · Applies to {app} (web app) and the {app} Chrome extension.
privacy.s1Body: {app} helps you capture job descriptions and tailor resumes and cover letters. We collect only what is needed to run the product. We do not sell your personal data.
privacy.s2Intro: The extension’s single purpose is to capture a job description from the page you choose and open or tailor documents in {app}.
privacy.s2Website: When you click Capture (or similar), the extension reads visible text from the active tab so it can extract the job posting. This happens only after you invoke the extension — not in the background across browsing.
privacy.s2Auth: For “Tailor now” and related API calls, the extension sends requests to your configured {app} origin with cookies (credentials: include) so you stay signed in. Credentials are not sent to job boards.
privacy.s2Local: App URL, tailoring preset, and similar preferences are stored in Chrome storage on your device.
privacy.s2Detect: On {app} pages, a content script may set a local flag so the web app can hide the install banner.
privacy.s2Outro: The extension does not sell data, does not use data for unrelated advertising, and does not transfer captured job text to third parties other than your configured {app} backend when you use product features.
privacy.s3Intro: When you use the {app} website, we may process:
privacy.s3Item1: Account details (such as email) for sign-in and account management
privacy.s3Item2: Resume, cover letter, and job description content you upload or generate
privacy.s3Item3: Usage and credit/plan information needed to provide the service
privacy.s3Item4: Technical logs (IP, browser type, error diagnostics) for security and reliability
privacy.s3Ai: AI features may send document text you provide to our model providers solely to generate or analyze content you requested. We do not use that content to sell ads.
privacy.s4Body: We process data to provide the service you request, to secure accounts, and to improve reliability. We retain account and document data while your account is active and as needed for legal or abuse-prevention purposes. You may request deletion of your account data by contacting us (see below).
privacy.s5Body: We share data with infrastructure and AI providers only as required to operate {app}, under contractual obligations. We do not sell personal information. We may disclose information if required by law or to protect users and the service.
privacy.s6Body: We use industry-standard measures such as HTTPS and httpOnly session cookies. No method of transmission or storage is 100% secure; please protect your account credentials.
privacy.s7Body: {app} is not directed at children under 13 (or the equivalent minimum age in your jurisdiction). We do not knowingly collect their data.
privacy.s8Body: We may update this policy. The “Last updated” date will change when we do. Continued use after updates constitutes acceptance of the revised policy.
privacy.s9Body: Questions about privacy or data deletion:
privacy.s9Note: (replace with your real support email before publishing).

templates.portfolioSubtitle: Ten live site themes for AI Portfolio — preview interactively, then publish.

portfolioPage.title: AI Portfolio Builder
portfolioPage.subtitle: Generate a live portfolio from your CV, publish it, and host it on your own domain. Saved portfolios stay here so you can open or share them anytime.
portfolioPage.limitBody: Free plan allows 1 portfolio. Edit your existing one, or upgrade to Pro for unlimited portfolios and all templates.
portfolioPage.freeTemplateHint: Free includes the Visionary template. Upgrade to Pro for all designs and AI generation.
portfolioPage.freeLimitTitle: Free plan allows 1 portfolio. Upgrade to Pro.
portfolioPage.hostBody: Every published portfolio is live at {url} with no dashboard chrome. Point your domain at this app (CNAME or reverse proxy) and share yourdomain.com/p/[id]. Use the Domain button on any card to copy step-by-step instructions.
portfolioPage.dropCv: Drop your CV here or click to browse
portfolioPage.blankHelp: Edit content yourself — no AI credits required.
portfolioPage.dropCvHere: Drop your CV or cover letter here
portfolioPage.orBrowse: or click to browse — PDF, DOCX, or TXT (max 3 pages)
portfolioPage.aiProFallback: Start a blank portfolio above, or upgrade for AI fill from your CV.
